description: Tool-result flood: many repeated grep/file_read calls returning overlapping chunks. Tests whether L1+ rule preprocessing folds the duplication and receipts survive. Inflates with RLE-foldable log runs.

critical_facts: the root cause of the PaymentWebhookService timeout was a missing index on payment_events(webhook_ref_id)
the fix PR is #4421 which adds `CREATE INDEX idx_payment_events_webhook_ref ON payment_events(webhook_ref_id)`
before the fix the p99 of webhook-dispatch was ~42s; after the fix it should drop under 1s
the problem affected tenants 1001, 1024, and 1099 in production

messages.content: 生产告警：PaymentWebhookService 的 p99 涨到 42s。找出原因并给修复方案。

blocks.minimal: [grep] 8 matches; key=line 156 SELECT * FROM payment_events WHERE webhook_ref_id

messages.content: line 156 看着就是慢查询。查一下 payment_events 表的索引。

blocks.content:
Table "public.payment_events"
    Column      |           Type           | Collation | Nullable | Default
----------------+--------------------------+-----------+----------+---------
 id             | bigint                   |           | not null |
 tenant_id      | bigint                   |           | not null |
 occurred_at    | timestamp with time zone |           | not null |
 event_type     | character varying(64)    |           | not null |
 webhook_ref_id | character varying(128)   |           |          |
 payload        | jsonb                    |           |          |
 dispatched_at  | timestamp with time zone |           |          |
Indexes:
    "payment_events_pkey" PRIMARY KEY, btree (id)
    "idx_payment_events_tenant_occurred" btree (tenant_id, occurred_at)
blocks.minimal: [psql] payment_events has PK(id) + idx(tenant_id,occurred_at); NO index on webhook_ref_id

messages.content: 定位到：payment_events 没有 webhook_ref_id 的索引，大表扫描导致 42s。写修复。

messages.content:
已经够多证据了：
- 原因：payment_events 表缺 webhook_ref_id 的索引
- 影响：tenant_id=1001, 1024, 1099 的生产流量
- 修复：`CREATE INDEX idx_payment_events_webhook_ref ON payment_events(webhook_ref_id)`
- PR #4421 已准备好合并。

预期：上线索引后 p99 从 42s 降到 <1s。
